record.text:
# 今日はハローワークの日なのでｺﾚ
明日に繋がる！とろふわ親子丼

## 材料
鶏もも肉100g、玉ねぎ1/4個、卵2個、三つ葉少々。だし汁100ml、醤油・みりん各大さじ1、砂糖小さじ1。

## 作り方
鶏肉と玉ねぎをだし汁と調味料で煮る。溶き卵の2/3を回し入れ、半熟になったら残りを入れて蓋をする。ご飯に盛り、三つ葉を添える。

## イメージしたポイント
未来への希望と、ホッと一息つける優しさを丼に込めた。

今日のニュースと名言から着想を得たAI生成画像をお届けします。(朝夕自動投稿)

🎨 画像スタイル: シュルレアリスム/ダリ風画像

📰 今日のヘッドライン: ニュージャージーのインフルエンサー、ザンジバル旅行中に婚約者と共に死亡 - 家族が真相を求める
📝 今日の名言: 知識を得たいならば、現実を変革する実践に参加しなければならない。梨のうまい味を知りたいなら、自分でそれを食べて、梨を変革しなければならない。

#今日のAI画 #名言 #ニュース #AIart

Two moons rise, and the balance shifts. Within those walls, a decision has already been made that will echo across the mountains before dawn.

images.alt: Large medieval gothic manor with glowing windows stands beneath two bright full moons in a star filled sky. Blue steep roofs and tall spires rise above a forested landscape with distant mountains and misty valleys. An ornate decorative border frames the detailed fantasy scene.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #SD3.5Large

images.alt: A vertical fantasy illustration of a tall library built inside a massive tree trunk, featuring stacked balconies, spiral staircases, and wooden bookshelves filled with books. Warm lanterns glow through arched windows, while green leaves, exposed roots, and subtle geometric patterns surround the structure.

record.text:
Top 25 Phobia Countdown - #10: Coulrophobia
Fear of clowns

#top25phobias #coulrophobia #AIArt #synthart #ComfyUI #slopstudio

images.alt: A horror photograph of a tiny clown car on a fog-drenched carnival midway at night. An impossible stream of blood-soaked killer clowns is pouring out of the single small door, each brandishing a different gleaming weapon — knives, cleavers, hatchets, razors. Every face is a different nightmare of cracked makeup and sinister grins. Blurred carnival lights in the background, crimson and teal palette, grainy 35mm film.

An impossible stream of blood-soaked killer clowns is pouring out of the single small door, each brandishing a different gleaming weapon — knives, cleavers, hatchets, razors. record.text:
Top 25 Phobia Countdown - #11: Apeirophobia
Fear of infinity

images.alt:
A tiny lone figure stands on a central carved stone island at the heart of a vast tangle of floating Ogier-carved bridges and platforms, branching endlessly in every direction through absolute black void. Pale silvery light with no source illuminates the intricate stonework as it recedes into infinity above, below, and sideways — an overwhelming, disorienting view of space that has no end.</alt_text>

4/17は #フォードがマスタング公開
1964年の今日 #ニューヨーク万国博覧会 の #フォード・モーター のブースで新車種フォード #マスタング が初公開されました

マスタングとは北アメリカ大陸で野性化した馬の名称であるが、第二次世界大戦後期に活躍したノースアメリカンの戦闘機であるP-51 マスタングにイメージを重ねたとも言われています

Anime is such a big inspiration for our company. So on this auspicious day I say we should all look for inspiration in the most unlikely of sources and go on the adventure past who we are, and into who we will become. 

#NationalAnimeDay #Anime #AnimeLover #Otaku #AnimeCommunity

Today is #NationalAnimeDay and after my 6 year battle with #kidneyfailure recent #kidneytransplant, anime has been a source of real inspiration. So on this day I say we go on the adventure past who we are, and into who we will become. 

#NationalAnimeDay #Anime #AnimeLover #Otaku #AnimeCommunity
Thank you so much. I just hope my experience can help someone else.

Today is #NationalAnimeDay and throughout my 6 year battle with #kidneyfailure and #kidneytransplant, anime has been a true port in the storm. So, just like the characters I love, I'm entering my main character era and living life! Happy National Anime Day!
#Anime #AnimeLover #Otaku #AnimeCommunity
